name: shinhan-pos-backend
description: Shinhan Soft POS API - Cloudflare Workers

scripts.db:init: wrangler d1 migrations apply shinhan-pos-db --local && wrangler d1 execute shinhan-pos-db --local --file=seeds/seed.sql
scripts.db:init:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply shinhan-pos-db --remote && wrangler d1 execute shinhan-pos-db --remote --file=seeds/seed.sql
scripts.db:reset: wrangler d1 execute shinhan-pos-db --local --file=migrations/0001_initial.sql && wrangler d1 execute shinhan-pos-db --local --file=seeds/seed.sql
scripts.db:reset:remote: wrangler d1 execute shinhan-pos-db --remote --file=migrations/0001_initial.sql && wrangler d1 execute shinhan-pos-db --remote --file=seeds/seed.sql
